entities.name: RICE
entities.description: The cereal crop being studied for productivity in iron-toxic environments

entities.description: Genetic variations of plants that can withstand iron toxicity

entities.description: Essential elements required by plants that may help mitigate iron toxicity

entities.description: The measure of yield and growth efficiency of rice

entities.name: IRON-TOXIC WETLANDS
entities.description: Lowland areas characterized by high iron levels in the soil
